description_short: Designate entire deposits with a single click. See deposit's composition. Clear debris. Create manual corner designations.
description_long: Auto Terrain Designations Automatically creates mining designations for your mine tower based on ore deposit depth — no manual painting required. Features - Create Designations: Scans the tower's area and places mining designations at the correct depth for the primary product found. - Auto-ramp: Optionally generates access ramps alongside the dig designations so excavators can reach deep layers. - Ore Composition: Shows a breakdown of which ores are present in the current designations. How to use 1. Select a Mine Control Tower. 2. Optionally use the ore filter to restrict which product to target. 3. Click Create Designations to scan and place designations. 4. Click the trash icon to clear all designations. Note: Only works with mining designations within the tower's managed area. Compatible with vanilla saves — can be added to or removed from existing saves safely.
